settings.bottom_header_text: Korean-inspired collagen masks that deliver visible results after just one use.

settings.text:
UP TO 75% OFF SITEWIDE

+ SPECIAL BUNDLE

Sourced for Purity & Potency -
Our mask is produced under strict quality standards, formulated without parabens, sulfates, artificial dyes, or harsh preservatives. Only skin-loving ingredients are included to target hydration, plumping, and smoothing.

Inspired by skincare professionals - this mask blends scientific formulation with the experience of thousands of customers, helping skin appear more hydrated, visibly plumper-looking, and radiantly healthy after every use.

Korean-Inspired Skincare Formula - We don’t just add “collagen” for the label—our mask is infused with low molecular weight hydrolyzed collagen and probiotics (Galactomyces ferment filtrate), ingredients that are backed by dermatological research for visible skin hydration, firmness, and resilience. This formula is designed to mimic the results seen in clinical skin studies.

Enhanced Absorption with Hydrogel Technology - Unlike thin cotton masks that dry out quickly, our unique jelly-like hydrogel texture locks in serum and molds to your skin for maximum contact. This ensures deep penetration of active ingredients and prevents quick evaporation—so your skin can drink in every drop of hydration.
Most sheet masks look the same—but there are critical differences that determine how well they actually perform for your skin. Here’s why ours stands out:
Tell your story
settings.title: Title

settings.text: Tell your story
settings.title: Title

settings.modal_text: Galactomyces is a fermented yeast extract rich in vitamins, amino acids, and antioxidants that help nourish and revitalize the skin. It works to improve skin clarity, refine pores, and balance sebum production. It enhances radiance, smooths texture, and supports a brighter, more even complexion.
settings.text: Radiance Booster
settings.title: Galactomyces

settings.modal_text: Glycerin is a powerful humectant that draws moisture into the skin and helps maintain hydration levels. It works to soften rough patches, improve skin elasticity, and support the skin’s natural barrier. In the Bio-Collagen Mask, it helps lock in moisture, keeping the skin plump, smooth, and comfortable during and after use.
settings.text: Moisture Lock
settings.title: Glycerin

settings.text: Tell your story
settings.title: Title

settings.modal_text: Our Bio-Collagen Mask uses fish collagen — a type of animal collagen extracted from the skin, scales, and gills of fish. It is widely used in food, health care products, and cosmetics due to its excellent absorption and skin-rejuvenating properties. It helps boost firmness and elasticity, enhances hydration by locking in moisture, and supports skin repair—visibly reducing the appearance of fine lines and promoting a smoother, plumper complexion.
settings.text: Deep Absorption
settings.title: Hydrolyzed Collagen

settings.modal_text: Hyaluronic acid is a moisture-binding ingredient that deeply hydrates the skin, helping it appear plump, smooth, and supple. It holds up to 1,000 times its weight in water, supporting skin elasticity and reducing the look of fine lines. In the Bio-Collagen Mask, it enhances absorption and boosts the mask’s firming and rejuvenating effects.
settings.text: Boosts Skin Hydration
settings.title: Hyaluronic Acid

settings.modal_text: Niacinamide is an ingredient that helps brighten skin tone, reduce the appearance of pores, and improve skin texture. It also strengthens the skin barrier, regulates oil production, and soothes inflammation—making it ideal for sensitive or aging skin. In the Bio-Collagen Mask, it enhances the overall clarity, smoothness, and resilience of the skin.
settings.text: Brightening Agent
settings.title: Niacinamide

settings.modal_text: Vitamin E is a powerful antioxidant that helps protect the skin from free radical damage and environmental stressors. It supports skin repair, soothes irritation, and strengthens the skin barrier. It works to nourish and protect the skin while enhancing moisture retention and promoting a smoother, healthier complexion.
settings.text: Skin Repair
settings.title: Vitamin E

settings.text: Each ingredient in our Bio-Collagen Mask is thoughtfully selected and supported by science—not hype. We use no harsh fillers or hidden additives—just a clean, transparent formula formulated with well-researched ingredients like low-molecular collagen, hyaluronic acid, niacinamide, and more for visible, skin-loving results.

settings.answer: Water, glycerin, propylene glycol, betaine, sodium carrageenan, polyurethane-35, glucomannan, 1,2-hexanediol, hydroxyacetophenone, butylene glycol, hydroxyethylcellulose, pentylene glycol, dipotassium glycyrrhizate, panthenol, potassium chloride, allantoin, tocopheryl acetate (vitamin E), niacinamide (vitamin B3), hydrolyzed collagen, hydrolyzed sodium hyaluronate, sodium hyaluronate, hydroxyphenyl propamidobenzoic acid, Glycyrrhiza Uralensis (licorice) root extract, Tremella Fuciformis (snow mushroom) extract, fructose, Centella Asiatica extract, phosphatidylcholine, phenoxyethanol, ceramide NP, copper tripeptide-1, beta-sitosterol, beta-glucan, sodium stearoyl glutamate, ethylhexylglycerin, caprylhydroxamic acid, acetyl hexapeptide-8, palmitoyl tripeptide-5.
settings.question: What ingredients are in the mask?

settings.answer:
🧴 Evening Routine: Cleanse and tone your face, ensuring your skin is free from oil and creams.

🎭 Application: Start with the bottom piece, followed by the top. Gently press for optimal adherence. Pro tip: Tilt your head back for a perfect fit.

⏳ Duration:

Express Glow: 1-2 hours

Maximum Results: Leave it on overnight (ensure it’s fully dry to prevent shifting).

💖 The Reveal: Gently remove the mask and pat the remaining essence into your skin. Pro tip: Use excess serum on your neck and décolleté.
settings.question: How do I use the Mask?

settings.answer: Yes! We stand behind the quality of our products. If you’re not satisfied with your purchase, you can request a return within 60 days of receiving your order. Simply contact our support team, and we’ll guide you through the process.
settings.question: 60-Day Money back-guarantee?

settings.answer: Each pack comes with 4 masks. Each mask is single use. We recommend starting with 2 masks per week for a month in order to get your skin glowing fast and rejuvenated. After the first month, you can use one mask per week to maintain a healthy skin.
settings.question: How many masks come in a pack?

settings.answer:
Processing Time: Once your order is placed, please allow 1 business day for us to process and prepare your order for shipment.

Shipping Time: After your order is dispatched, it will typically take 3-5 business days to reach you, depending on your location.

Tracking Information: Once your order has been shipped, you will receive an email containing your tracking number. You can use this to track your package and stay updated on its delivery status.
